---
created: "2026-03-25T00:00:00Z"
updated:"2026-04-01T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep
key: sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep
state:complete
tags:
  - sv0
  - sv0-toolchain
  - milestone-2
  - self-hosting-prep
  - tooling
title: "milestone 2 (prep): self-hosting preparation ŌĆö test, fmt, doc, rewrite entry"
type: task
roadmap_parent: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full
---

# milestone 2 (preparation slice): tooling and compiler-in-sv0 entry

## purpose

the [vision and design](http://development.sasankvishnubhatla.net/tcowmbh/task/sv0-compiler-vision-and-design.html) **milestone 2** includes more than the bytecode VM: **test framework** (`sv0 test`, doc tests), **`sv0 fmt`** and **`sv0 doc`** for **sv0 source**, and **beginning the rewrite** of compiler components in sv0.

this task file owns the **non-VM** parts of design milestone 2. the VM stack is **`task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd`**.

## dependencies

/require: bash
/require: python3

## configuration

/env: SV0TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.
/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SV0VM_ROOT=sv0vm
/env: SV0DOC_ROOT=sv0doc

## prerequisite

bytecode path usable for fast iteration (see `task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd`).

/assert: test -d $SV0C_ROOT/sml/backend/vm

## completion criteria (met)

- **`sv0 test`**: `./scripts/sv0 test` runs, in order: **sv0c** `make test`, **sv0vm** bytecode tests, **C** integration (`task/sv0c-milestone-1/02-integration-test.sh`), **VM** integration (`task/sv0vm-milestone-2/02-integration-test.sh`), **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`** entries on the VM (`bootstrap-build`), and **Markdown doctests** (`scripts/sv0_doctest.py`). Any failure yields a non-zero exit (CI-stable).
- **doc tests**: `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep/doctests.md` defines ```sv0 doctest``` fences; policy and runner documented in that file. Run alone via `./scripts/sv0 doctest`.
- **`sv0 fmt`**: **`scripts/fmt_sv0.py`** normalizes trailing whitespace and final newline for all `*.sv0` under `sv0c/` and `sv0vm/`. Shell-only formatting is **`./scripts/sv0 fmt-shell`**; **`./scripts/sv0 fmt`** runs both.
- **`sv0 doc`**: **`scripts/gen_sv0_doc.py`** writes **`build/sv0-toolchain-doc/index.md`** (spec pointers + outline of `sv0c/lib/**/*.sv0`). Same command still verifies expected **sv0doc** and **sv0-mcp** README paths.
- **bootstrap-in-sv0 entry**: **`sv0c/lib/`** with **`span_core.sv0`** (seed transliteration of `sml/error/span.sml`), **`lib/README.md`**, **`lib/LAYOUT.md`**, and **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`**; commands `./scripts/sv0 bootstrap-build`, `sml` + `--target=vm`. **`sml/`** holds the SML bootstrap; top-level **`lexer/`**, etc. are reserved for future sv0 modules.

## implementation notes

- **`.sv0.md` literate** formatting is **out of scope** for this slice (no normative grammar change in sv0doc); extend `fmt_sv0.py` when blocks are specified.
- **`sv0 doc`** is an **index / outline**, not a full API reference with contracts; link to **sv0doc** and the vision doc for normative prose.
- Some **`main`** control-flow shapes still **omit IR lowering** in the bootstrap compiler; **`span_core.sv0`** uses straight-line code so **VM** emits `main` (see `lib/README.md`).

## refinement log

- 2026-03-25: initial scaffold; criteria copied from design milestone 2; VM split documented.
- 2026-04-01: implemented unified test, doctest runner, fmt_sv0, doc generator, `sv0c/rewrite/`; marked **complete**.
- 2026-04-02: SML bootstrap ŌåÆ **`sv0c/sml/`**; sv0 seeds ŌåÆ **`sv0c/lib/`**; recursive **`--project`**; **`lexer/`** placeholder; **`bootstrap-build`** + **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`** only (no **`rewrite-build`** / **`rewrite-sources.list`**).
- 2026-04-03: **`lib/diagnostic_core.sv0`** + golden **`diagnostic_core.c`** (diagnostics transliteration after **`span_core`**).
- 2026-04-04: **`lib/diagnostic_batch_core.sv0`**, **`lib/env_core.sv0`**, **`lexer/token_keyword_core.sv0`** + goldens; **sv0vm** `RETURN_SLOTS` fix for struct return.
- 2026-04-05: **`lib/resolver_value_core.sv0`** (three-slot `lookup_value` / `resolve_path_ok`); **`lexer/token_delim_core.sv0`** (delimiter tag band + `is_delimiter_tag`); stage0 goldens + **`bootstrap-sources.list`**.
- 2026-04-06: **`lib/resolver_arity_core.sv0`** (fn arity table + `call_arity_ok`); **`lib/env_scope_core.sv0`** (enter/bind/exit/local lookup); goldens + list.
- 2026-04-07: **`lib/lookup_value_core.sv0`** ŌĆö merged **`FullEnv`** (`lookup_value` = locals then module); golden + list.
- 2026-04-08: **`lib/resolver_call_core.sv0`** (values + locals + arity + **`expr_call_ok`**); **`lib/lookup_type_core.sv0`** (prelude tags, module types, **Self**); goldens + list.
- 2026-04-09: **`lib/type_alias_core.sv0`**, **`lexer/token_op_core.sv0`** + goldens.
- 2026-04-10: **`lib/lookup_type_alias_core.sv0`** + golden (integrated type lookup + aliases).
- 2026-04-11: **`parser/expr_entry_core.sv0`** + golden (`parsePrimaryExpr` dispatch vs **`parser.sml`**).
- 2026-04-12: **`lexer/token_delim_core.sv0`** bracket tags + **`expr_entry_core`** bracket **16**; refreshed goldens.
- 2026-04-13: **`parser/item_entry_core.sv0`** + golden (`parseItem` dispatch).
- 2026-04-14: **`parser/stmt_entry_core.sv0`** + golden (`tryStmt` dispatch).
- 2026-04-15: **`lexer/token_keyword_core.sv0`** break/continue tags + **`stmt_entry_core`** alignment; goldens refreshed.
- 2026-04-16: **`parser/assign_lhs_core.sv0`** + golden (assign LHS slice).
- 2026-04-17: **`lexer/token_delim_core.sv0`** DOT + assignment **`=`**; **`assign_lhs_core`** + goldens refreshed.
- 2026-04-18: **`parser/try_assign_stmt_core.sv0`** + golden (`tryAssignStmt` stub).
- 2026-04-19: **`parser/assign_binop_core.sv0`** + golden; **`assign_lhs_core`** / **`try_assign_stmt_core`** refreshed.
- 2026-04-20: **`lexer/token_op_core.sv0`** compound-assign tags **211ŌĆō220** + golden.
- 2026-04-21: **`parser/expr_rhs_stub_core.sv0`** + **`try_assign_stmt_core`** RHS stub + goldens.
- 2026-04-22: **`try_assign_stmt_core`** ŌĆö **`try_assign_deref_op_rhs_stub`** (7-arg) for **`*x = 1 + 2`**, truncated RHS, wrong leading token; golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-23: **`try_assign_field_op_rhs_stub`** (8-arg) for **`a.b = 1 + 2`**, truncated RHS, **`EQ` instead of DOT** between segments; golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-24: **`try_assign_index_op_rhs_stub`** (9-arg) for **`a[i] = 1 + 2`** (**`[`**/**`]`** **16**/**17**), truncated RHS, **`DOT` instead of `[`**; golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-25: **`parser/expr_pratt_stub_core.sv0`** ŌĆö **`pratt_rhs_ok_with_semi`** (**tag_op_plus** **20** vs **tag_op_star** **22**, six-token window); bootstrap list + golden.
- 2026-04-26: **`try_assign_stmt_core`** ŌĆö **`try_assign_id_op_pratt_rhs_stub`** + duplicated **`pratt_rhs_ok_with_semi`**; **`tok_binop_star`**; golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-27: Pratt RHS helpers for **deref** / **field** / **index** LHS (**9** / **10** / **11** args); golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-28: **`parser/expr_prec_ladder_core.sv0`** ŌĆö **`parseAddExpr`** / **`parseMulExpr`** tier ranks (**20ŌĆō21** vs **22ŌĆō23**) + golden; documents SML ladder above numeric Pratt.

## related

- `task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd` ŌĆö full option C index
- `task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd` ŌĆö VM backend + interpreter + REPL slice
